ultiprocessor DSP Architectures* S. Sriram, and Edward A. Lee Presented at the Twenty-Eighth Annual Conference on Signals, Systems, and Computers Asilomar, Nov 1994 Prepublished version Published version ABSTRACT In statically scheduled multiprocesso

ion ABSTRACT In statically scheduled multiprocessors inter-processor communication resources can be scheduled by determining, at compile time, the order in which processors require access to shared resources and enforcing this order at run time. We s

sources and enforcing this order at run time. We show how to choose an access order such that, under certain assumptions, imposing that order incurs no performance penalty. * The authors were supported by SRC (DC-008-014), ARPA and US Air Force (unde
d by SRC (DC-008-014), ARPA and US Air Force (under the RASSP program), and the NSF (MIP9201605).
